Multiple attempts to query the salary information were made, but no valid salary entries were found for US Congress members. Wikidata does not currently store salary data for this position, so the average cannot be calculated.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?salary WHERE {
  wd:Q1046641 wdt:P1084 ?salary
}
```
